creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
This port is vulnerable to several CVEs, test suite segfaults on 13-STABLE and is deprecated upstream in favour of PDAL as of 2018 according to upstream https://liblas.org/

Having a quick look I spotted several potential useful patches from various repos.

https://sources.debian.org/patches/liblas/1.8.1-10/
https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/liblas/blob/rawhide/f/liblas.spec
https://gitweb.gentoo.org/repo/gentoo.git/tree/sci-geosciences/liblas/liblas-1.8.1-r3.ebuild#n30
